assumptions: Proceed with a 6-phase migration: contract foundation, backend migration, transcript audit UI, analysis/report UI, validation and rollout, legacy cleanup.
Phase 1 is backend-only; transcript UI does not ship until a later phase.
Phase 2 includes API, workers, and exports together so the compatibility contract stays in one place.
discovery.summary: Discovery complete. The plan is stable enough to proceed with a phased feature-factory run that keeps the versioned V2 boundary before UI migration and separates transcript audit UI from report UI for safety.
